reviews.review_description: the experience was actually fun, needs slight refinements, but it did make me get on my treadmill!
I did the part where the ghost comes up and we have to chase and punch things to complete mission. Honestly I had fun!

I must admit, I was a little weary about walking on a treadmill with my eyes covered but, they have a “window” that allows you to see the treadmill and buttons. I really enjoy this game, I see the potential. I hope it’s a one time purchase with “packs” that you can purchase that include: music, environments, workouts, & intensity; as opposed to a monthly subscription. I’d much rather spend $30+ on an app and purchase add ons rather than being stuck with a monthly subscription.

developer_response.body: Thank You so much for the review! Feel free to suggest any packs you would like to see on the app. We are in experimental stage right now and don't plan on getting paid anytime soon!

reviews.review_description: Mind blowing🌈🌈🌈                                                                     We want more:an addition in free running !!!                                                          It would be a new perfect opportunity🥇🥇🥇
I wish I would of known it had a talking possessed skeleton right away. No options to not see this. Just right in my face

developer_response.body: We are sorry for your experience and understand your frustration with encountering unexpected content in the game. It sounds like the presence of the talking possessed skeleton caught you off guard. While some players enjoy surprises and unexpected twists, we understand it is important for us to provide options for players to tailor their experience to their preferences. Thank you for sharing your feedback, as it helps us understand what players enjoy and what areas might need improvement.

reviews.review_description: I tried this game yesterday, and was wowed by the innovation. the open window to see through pass-through is genius. The dev ii
i love the idea of being able to run through cool environments while working out, very fun!
I have this but can't get into it, it comes up with hand controllers not connected

developer_response.body: Hi, Thank you for taking the time to leave a review. We apologize for any confusion or inconvenience caused. Please note that in order to use the app you will need to enable hand tracking on your headset.

reviews.review_description: Third Dimension provides innovative entertaining environments and dramatic story lines as I walk in mixed reality. The app is orientated toward hand tracking also so I think it is more ideal with the higher quality headsets; such as I use Quest Pro.
